scripts.dev: concurrently 'pushd client && npm run dev && popd' 'pushd server && npm run dev && popd'
scripts.docker:build: pushd client && npm run docker:build && popd && pushd server && npm run docker:build && popd
scripts.docker:push: pushd client && npm run docker:push && popd && pushd server && npm run docker:push && popd
scripts.docker:push:latest: pushd client && npm run docker:push:latest && popd && pushd server && npm run docker:push:latest && popd
